title: CVE-2008-1205 — CVSS 4.9 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2008-1205

CVSS Score: 4.9 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2008-03-08T00:44:00.000
CWEs: NVD-CWE-noinfo

Unspecified vulnerability in the ipsecah kernel module in Sun Solaris 10, when a key management daemon for IPsec security associations is running, allows local users to cause a denial of service (panic) via unspecified vectors.

References: http://secunia.com/advisories/29253, http://sunsolve.sun.com/search/document.do?assetkey=1-26-233761-1, http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/28112
